title: Food and Catering
content: The shipowner shall ensure protection and promotion of the health of the seafarer and ensure that ships carry onboard food and drinking water of appropriate quality, quantity and nutritional value that adequately cover the requirements of the ship and take into consideration the differing cultural and religious backgrounds. The foods and drinks and the preparation thereof shall be in accordance with the standards of the Sanitation Code of the Philippines and pertinent laws, rules and regulations implemented by the DOH.

metadata.source_file: Rules and Regulations on the Employment of Seafarers Onboard Philippine Registered Ships Engaged in International Voyage - Department Order No. 130, Series of 2013.pdf
